tagline: Storytelling through rhythm, voice, and lens — building brands and culture across stages and screens.
freelanceNote: Open to brand campaigns, performance bookings, and collaborations with directors and labels.
bio: Prasanna is a multidisciplinary performer and content creator. She moves between dance floors, recording booths, and her camera — turning rhythm, voice, and personality into stories that move millions. From viral reels to live sets to brand campaigns, she builds work that people remember and share.

services.title: Digital Marketing
services.desc: End-to-end social strategy — content calendars, paid campaigns, growth experiments, and analytics that move the needle.
bullets: Audience research, positioning, and channel-specific content strategy.
Paid Meta & Google campaigns with creative testing and weekly optimisation.
Organic growth playbooks for Instagram, YouTube Shorts, and emerging platforms.
Monthly reporting with clear KPIs, learnings, and next-step recommendations.

services.title: Brand Promotion
services.desc: Influencer collaborations, brand campaigns, and live activations that turn viewers into customers and customers into fans.
bullets: Lead-talent and creative direction for brand films, reels, and OOH.
Influencer pods and creator collaborations matched to your brand.
Live Instagram takeovers, festive activations, and launch event hosting.
Performance reports — saves, clickthroughs, and conversion lift per asset.

services.title: Photo Shoots
services.desc: Studio and on-location photoshoots — editorial portraits, lookbooks, product flat-lays, and lifestyle stills built for the feed and beyond.
bullets: Concept boards, location scouting, styling, and full creative direction.
Studio and outdoor shoots with hand-picked photographers and crew.
Editorial portraits, lookbooks, product stills, and behind-the-scenes.
Edited, colour-graded final assets in formats tuned for every channel.

services.title: Video Shoots
services.desc: From short-form reels to brand films and music videos — full-cycle video production with a director who also performs on camera.
bullets: Scripting, storyboarding, and choreography tailored to your brand voice.
Production with vetted DPs, lighting, sound, and styling teams.
Edit, colour, sound design, and platform-specific cutdowns.
Reels, brand films, music videos, and YouTube long-form.

experiences.desc: Mainstage dance and vocal set blending choreography, live vocals, and original release for one of India's flagship music festivals.
bullets: Featured set on the main festival stage with original choreography to a live mix.
Collaborated with the creative team on staging, costume, and lighting.
Closed with an original release, driving streams across Spotify and YouTube Music.

experiences.desc: Lead face and movement direction for the festive beauty campaign across digital and OOH.
bullets: Anchored a multi-asset rollout: hero film, stills, BTS reels, and Instagram live.
Drove a 38% lift in reel saves and a 22% lift in product-page clickthroughs.
Partnered with brand creative on look development and a co-branded reel series.

experiences.desc: Independent four-track EP — songwriting, vocals, music video direction, and a three-city showcase tour.
bullets: Wrote, recorded, and released four tracks across Spotify, Apple Music, YouTube Music.
Produced and starred in the lead single's music video.
Hit 500K+ streams in the first month with editorial pickup on Indie India playlists.
Sold out two of three rooms on the showcase tour.

experiences.desc: Self-directed weekly choreography reels — concept, choreography, performance, edit, release.
bullets: Grew the channel from 12K to 120K+ followers in under twelve months.
Three reels crossed one million views with notable creator and brand co-signs.
Opened a parallel YouTube long-form channel for performance vlogs and BTS.
